_source: Loop 3a Phase 1 — initial thresholds for CTC forced-alignment match classification, drawn from the spec's recommended values.
_caveats: Thresholds are starting estimates. Tune against the test corpus once Loop 3b begins emitting alignment evidence on real diagnostic/stretch clips.
avg_log_prob is computed in nats (natural log of softmax probability), matching torchaudio.functional.forced_align's output convention.
produced/near_miss/absent are mutually exclusive; every aligned position lands in exactly one class.
evidence_strength ratios use ceil(expected_count * ratio) so single-occurrence phonemes are still classifiable.

alignment_quality_thresholds._note: alignment_quality summarises the average per-frame avg_log_prob across all aligned positions. Tighter than per-position thresholds because it averages across many positions.
